scripts.guard:optional-chaining: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=path.join(process.cwd(),'src');const bad=[];const walk=(d)=>{for(const n of fs.readdirSync(d)){const p=path.join(d,n);const s=fs.statSync(p);if(s.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(/\.js$/i.test(n)){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(/\?\s+\./.test(c)) bad.push(path.relative(process.cwd(),p));}}};walk(root);if(bad.length){console.error('Malformed optional chaining found in:');for(const f of bad)console.error('- '+f);process.exit(1);}console.log('Optional chaining guard passed.');"
